bulk.deleteConfirm: Delete {{count}} selected items? This cannot be undone.
bulk.deactivateConfirm: Deactivate {{count}} selected items? They will no longer be available for new transactions.
bulk.deleteFailed: Could not delete the selected items.

importExport.exportStarted: Export queued. Track progress in the jobs tray.
importExport.modeHint: Create adds new records, update modifies existing ones, upsert does both.
importExport.selectFile: Choose a spreadsheet file to upload.
importExport.uploadIntro: Upload a spreadsheet (.xlsx, .xls, or .csv). You will map columns and configure validation rules before importing.
importExport.mappingIncomplete: Map all required columns before continuing.
importExport.dryRun: Dry run (validate only, no changes saved)
importExport.strictMode: Strict mode (stop if any row has errors)
importExport.progressHint: Progress is cumulative across validation and import phases.
importExport.columnMappingHint: Match each system field to a column in your file.
importExport.validationIntroDescription: Enable or disable validation rules and import behaviors before processing your file. These settings apply only to this import job.
importExport.columnValidationRulesHint: Expand each field to enable, disable, or configure validation rules and transforms.
importExport.noRulesEnabled: No validation rules enabled for this column.

errorReport.title: Error report
errorReport.subtitle: Review validation and processing errors below. You can filter and search to find specific issues.
errorReport.searchPlaceholder: Search by row, column, value, or message…

importExport.logsSubtitle: Shows the most recent import for this module. Starting a new import replaces the previous log.
importExport.logsEmptyDescription: Run an import first. Only the latest import is kept here.

confirm.deleteUser: Delete {{name}}? This will permanently remove their account and access.
confirm.deactivateUser: Deactivate {{name}}? They will no longer be able to sign in.
confirm.deleteRole: Delete {{name}}? Users assigned this role may lose access.
confirm.deletePermission: Delete {{name}}? This will remove the permission from all roles that use it.
confirm.deleteBranch: Delete {{name}}? Warehouses and assignments for this branch will be removed.
confirm.deactivateWarehouse: Deactivate {{name}}? It will be hidden from inventory and transfer pickers.
confirm.deleteCategory: Delete {{name}}? Products in this category will be uncategorized.
confirm.deleteBrand: Delete {{name}}? Products for this brand will be unbranded.
confirm.deleteCustomer: Delete {{name}}? Their loyalty history and wallet records will be removed.
confirm.deleteCustomerGroup: Delete {{name}}? Customers in this group will be unassigned.
confirm.deleteUnit: Delete {{name}}? Products using this unit must be updated first.
confirm.deleteProduct: Delete {{name}}? All variants and identifiers will be removed.

users.title: Team Members
users.description: Manage users, roles, and access permissions across all branches.

roles.title: Roles
roles.description: Define access profiles and assign permissions to each role.

permissions.title: Permissions
permissions.description: Granular capabilities assigned to roles across the system.

branches.title: Branches
branches.description: Manage store locations, warehouses, and per-branch operational settings.
branches.createDescription: Add a new branch with a default warehouse.
branches.cutoverHint: Live POS sale deductions are blocked until this date. Imports and manual adjustments are unaffected.
branches.operationalDefaultsHint: Pre-selected from Admin → Settings → General. Choose from the configured currency and timezone lists.
branches.codeUniqueHint: Unique branch code assigned automatically when saved.
branches.codeImmutableHint: Branch codes are auto-generated at creation and cannot be changed.

warehouseSection.createHint: Select an existing warehouse from Organisation → Warehouses to use as the template for this branch's default location.
warehouseSection.editHint: Choose the default warehouse for this branch from warehouses managed in Organisation → Warehouses.
warehouseSection.createInfo: No warehouses exist yet. A default Main Warehouse will be created automatically for this branch.
warehouseSection.createPickerInfo: Pick a warehouse from your catalogue. A new warehouse record will be created for this branch using the same name and a unique auto-generated code.
warehouseSection.defaultOnCreate: The selected warehouse will become this branch's default.
warehouseSection.noPickerWarehouses: No warehouses in the catalogue yet. A default Main Warehouse will be created automatically.
warehouseSection.noWarehouses: No active warehouses for this branch yet.
warehouseSection.templateCodeHint: Source code: {{code}} — a new unique code will be assigned for this branch.

warehouses.title: Warehouses
warehouses.description: Manage storage locations per branch for inventory, transfers, and receiving.
warehouses.inactiveNotice: This warehouse is inactive and cannot be edited.

fields.name: Name
fields.default: Set as default warehouse for this branch

warehouses.codePreviewHint: Preview — a unique code is assigned automatically when saved.
warehouses.codeUniqueHint: Next available unique code for this branch.
warehouses.codeImmutableHint: Warehouse codes are auto-generated at creation and cannot be changed.

inventory.title: Stock levels
inventory.description: Real-time on-hand and reserved quantities by warehouse.
inventory.empty: No inventory records yet. Receive stock to get started.
inventory.adjustDescription: Correct counts or record damaged goods (use negative quantity to reduce).
inventory.receiveDescription: Increase on-hand quantity (purchase receive). Optionally assign a bin or receive to quarantine for QC.
inventory.quarantineReceiveHint: Stock is held in quarantine and excluded from sellable availability until released.
inventory.quantitySignedHint: Positive adds stock; negative removes (e.g. damaged write-off).
inventory.serialNumbersHint: Enter {{count}} unique serial number(s), one per unit.

binTransfer.title: Bin transfer
binTransfer.description: Move stock between bin locations within the same warehouse.

branchStockSettings.title: Branch stock settings
branchStockSettings.description: Per-branch reorder points and safety stock overrides.
branchStockSettings.selectBranchHint: Select a branch from the header switcher to manage branch-specific stock settings.

quarantine.title: Quarantine stock
quarantine.description: Goods pending QC — excluded from sellable availability.
quarantine.confirmRelease: Release all quarantined quantity to sellable stock?
quarantine.confirmScrap: Scrap all quarantined quantity? This cannot be undone.

fields.blindCount: Blind count (hide system qty from counters)
fields.freezeMode: Freeze movements in scope until posted

countScheduleRules.title: Count schedules
countScheduleRules.description: Recurring rules that auto-create draft count sessions (processed nightly).

stockTransfers.title: Stock transfers
stockTransfers.description: Move stock between warehouses with ship and receive confirmation.
stockTransfers.createDescription: Draft a transfer; stock moves when you ship and receive.

sales.title: Sales
sales.description: Completed and in-progress sales for the active branch.
sales.showDescription: Sale detail, line items, and payment history.

customers.title: Customers
customers.description: 360° customer profiles, loyalty tiers, wallets, and credit limits.
customers.showDescription: Customer profile, balances, and transaction history.
customers.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, phone, or email…
customers.createDescription: Add a customer with contact details and credit settings.

programs.title: Loyalty Programs
programs.description: Configure earning, redemption, tiers, and campaigns.

hints.scopeType: Controls which branches the program applies to.
hints.earnScope: Whether points are earned globally or per branch.
hints.redeemScope: Whether points are redeemed globally or per branch.
hints.branches: Select the branches that participate in this program.

reports.title: Loyalty Reports
reports.description: Points earned, redeemed, expired, and tier distribution.

transactions.title: Loyalty Transactions
transactions.description: Review and approve loyalty point movements.

rules.title: Earning & Redemption Rules
rules.description: Configure how customers earn and redeem points.

tiers.title: Loyalty Tiers
tiers.description: Define tier levels, qualification thresholds, and multipliers.

approvals.title: Approval Policies
approvals.description: Require manager approval when thresholds are exceeded.

loyalty.confirmDelete: Delete this item? This cannot be undone.

customerGroups.title: Customer Groups
customerGroups.description: Named groups for pricing and segmentation (Wholesale, VIP, Staff, etc.).

arAging.title: AR Aging Report
arAging.description: Outstanding receivables by age bucket as of {{date}}.
arAging.empty: No aging data for the selected filters.

categories.title: Categories
categories.description: Organize products into a hierarchical category tree.

units.title: Units of measure
units.description: Manage measurement units used by products (each, kg, liter, etc.).
units.createDescription: Add a unit of measure for product catalog items.

products.title: Products
products.description: Product master data, variants, bundles, and identifiers.
products.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, SKU, or barcode...
products.createDescription: Add a product with auto-generated SKU and barcode.
products.autoIdentifiers: SKU and barcode are generated automatically unless you provide overrides on save.
products.variableDefaultPricingHint: Default prices for new variant combinations. Set each variant's price in the matrix below.
products.variantPricingHint: Set a sell price (and optional cost) for each variant combination. POS uses the variant price at checkout.
products.variantPricingEmpty: Add attribute names and options above to generate variant combinations.
products.serializedHint: Serial numbers are captured when stock is received (Phase 5).
products.regenerateVariants: Regenerate all variants from attributes (replaces existing variants)
products.bundleEmpty: Search and add component products to this bundle.
products.bundleHint: Bundle resolves child line items for POS checkout.
products.branchPricingHint: Optional sell price overrides per branch.
products.imagesHint: JPEG, PNG, or WebP up to 5 MB each. Maximum {{max}} images. Images are resized on upload.
products.removedImagesNotice: {{count}} image(s) will be removed when you save.
products.imageSyncFailed: Product saved, but images could not be uploaded. Try again.
products.supplierHint: Used by auto-reorder when stock falls below the reorder point.

suppliers.title: Suppliers
suppliers.description: Manage supplier master data, balances, and statements.

suppliers.contactsEmptyHint: Click to add a supplier contact
suppliers.addressesEmptyHint: Click to add a billing or shipping address

fields.managerPin: Manager PIN (Required — PO Exceeds Approval Threshold)

hints.overrideReason: Required if price differs from supplier list

placeholders.notes: Internal notes for this purchase order…

purchaseOrders.saleRequired: Select a customer sale when drop ship is enabled.
purchaseOrders.dropShipHint: Goods ship directly to the customer; inventory is not increased on receive.

purchaseOrders.pinRequired: Enter your 6-digit manager PIN to approve this purchase order.
purchaseOrders.noPinConfigured: No POS PIN is set on your account. Set one under Admin → Users → Edit your profile before approving.

goodsReceiving.virtualReceive: Virtual receive (drop ship — no stock movement)

hints.returnQty: Enter return quantities up to the available amount on this GRN.

settings.readOnlyHint: You can view these settings but do not have permission to change them.
